goals: Store explicit preference about film preferences
Search for stored memories about film recommendations
Review all stored memories to verify what's saved
Delete any irrelevant or outdated memories

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and straightforward. Prefers clear, mainstream entertainment over niche content. Values efficiency and dislikes wasting time on uncertain choices.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic memory concepts but does not know tool names or internal APIs. Knows they want to save and retrieve preferences about films but relies on assistant to handle the mechanics.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their film preference, verified it was saved by searching and listing memories, and cleaned up any unwanted memories.
